source: Warhammer Event Companion v1.0 (Dec 2024) — official terrain layouts
setupSteps: Place terrain areas per Layout A, B or C for this Force Disposition pairing.
Set up terrain features on those areas (dense = green, light = yellow in the PDF).
Agree Attacker and Defender edges; Defender deploys first.
Objective markers per the layout (home, central, expansion).
